business.name: The Boys Farmers Market
business.tagline: Bringing our gourmet meals from our kitchen to your table!

price_units.platter: Flat price for the platter/tray as described
price_units.per_pieces: Price for the stated piece-count tier
price_units.unpriced: No price printed on the menu - confirm with the store

sections.name: Fruit Platters
sections.note: All fruits are seasonal, but most platters come with Honeydew, Cantaloupe, Watermelon, Pineapple, Strawberries, Kiwi & Grapes.

sections.name: Paradise Platters
sections.note: Paradise Platters have exotic fruits such as Mango, Papaya, Dragon Fruit, and Coconut.

items.name: Berry Medley
items.description: Contains Strawberries, Blueberries, Blackberries and Raspberries.

items.name: Fruit Kabobs
items.description: Beautifully displayed over fresh Pineapple and fruit.

items.name: Whole Fruit Basket (with Cookies, Cheese and Crackers)
Whole Fruit Basket (with Cookies, Cheese, Crackers and Wine)
items.description: With Cookies, Cheese, Crackers and Wine. Add Candy or Coffee.

sections.name: Vegetable Platters
sections.note: All Veggie Platters come with broccoli, carrots, cauliflower, cucumber, celery, grape tomatoes, yellow & green squash, and peppers. Choice of: all platters are served with the Boys' Own Dip OR Homemade Hummus.

sections.name: Special Sizes Available
sections.note: In a hurry? No need to order, smaller options always available to pick up and go!

sections.name: Cheese Platters
sections.note: Cheese platters include Brie, Havarti, Goat Cheese (Rosey Goat w/ Rosemary), Sheep Cheese (Manchego), Cheddar, Blueberries, Boysenberries, Raspberries, a variety of Fruits and Crackers included.

sections.name: Custom Charcuterie Boards
sections.note: Ask about our custom charcuterie boards!

items.name: Custom Charcuterie Board
items.description: Ask about our custom charcuterie boards!

categories.name: Wine Menu
categories.data_quality_warning: In the source PDF every varietal below lists the SAME three wines at the same prices. This looks like unfinished placeholder content in the menu itself, not a parsing error. Verify against the real wine list before mailing.

sections.name: Cold Appetizer Platters
sections.note: Priced by tray size.

items.name: Greek Platter
items.description: w/ Hummus, Feta, Olives, Grape Leaves, Goat Cheese, Mini Pita Bread, Spinach Pie Mini's, & Tzatziki Sauce

items.name: Bread Baskets
items.description: Assorted Breads, Bread Sticks, Crostini's, etc.

sections.name: Cold Cut Platters
sections.note: Priced per person. Choose a platter style from the Platter Choices below.

items.name: Cold Cut Platter Including
items.description: With mustard, mayo, lettuce, onions, pickles, rolls & rye bread.

items.name: Cold Cut Platter Deluxe
items.description: All the above plus bread, potato salad, macaroni salad, & coleslaw.
items.note: Source PDF labels this row 'COLD CUT PLATTER ONLY' again, which appears to be a typo in the menu; renamed to 'Deluxe' for clarity.

sections.name: Hot Appetizers
sections.note: Priced by piece count.

sections.name: Chicken Wings
sections.note: All wing flavors share the same piece-count pricing.

sections.name: Rollups

items.name: Tuna Salad
items.description: Albacore White Solid Tuna, made in house

items.name: Egg Salad
items.description: Made in house with cage free eggs, tomato and lettuce

sections.name: Pinwheels
sections.note: Garnish Trays available in 12", 16" and 18".

sections.name: 2' Heros
sections.note: $24.99 per foot. All subs come with lettuce and tomato on the sub; mayonnaise, mustard or Italian dressing on the side. Other varieties available at exchanges. Cut in 1/8's or 1/16's. Prices may vary.

items.name: Egg Salad

items.name: Ciabatta Bread Hero 16" Platter
items.description: Cut in 8 pieces with lettuce, tomatoes, onion garnish with condiments Mayo & Mustard, etc.

items.name: Sandwiches
items.description: Cut in 1/2, assorted rye bread or others. Your choice of Tuna Salad, Chicken Salad, Egg Salad, Ham, Cheese, Roast Beef, Turkey and many more. With lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, mayo & mustard.

sections.name: Pasta Entrees
sections.note: Half pan feeds 10-12 people; full pan feeds 20-25 people.

sections.name: Without Pasta
sections.note: Half pan feeds 10-12 people; full pan feeds 20-25 people.

sections.name: Chicken Entrees
sections.note: All chicken entrees share the same pricing. Half pan feeds 10-12 people; full pan feeds 20-25 people.

sections.name: Meat Entrees
sections.note: Prime Rib and Filet Mignon appear on the menu page but their prices are rendered inside the page artwork and were not present in the text layer. Confirm before mailing.

items.name: Filet Mignon Platter
items.description: Thinly sliced, served with horseradish sauce & crostini.

sections.name: Side Dishes
sections.note: 10 person minimum.

sections.name: Side Dishes - Priced by the Pound
Smoked Fish Platters
sections.note: All fish platters come complete with sliced Nova, de-boned Whitefish, Whitefish Salad, Baked Salmon, Creamed Herring & Sliced Sable. Subject to availability. All trays include 2 bagels per person, 2 kinds of cream cheese, lettuce, tomato, olives, onions & cucumbers.

items.name: Smoked Fish Platter (All Trays)
items.description: All trays include 2 bagels per person, 2 kinds of cream cheese, lettuce, tomato, olives, onions & cucumbers.

items.name: Poached Salmon
items.description: Beautifully decorated with cucumbers, lettuce, and/or lemon, served with a sour cream dill sauce!

items.name: Poached Salmon
items.description: Served with lettuce, cucumbers, lemons & tzatziki dill sauce.

items.name: Poached Salmon Individuals
items.description: Served at room temperature with lettuce, lemons, & tzatziki sauce.

items.name: Grilled Salmon
items.description: S.O.S. with teriyaki sauce or orange glaze & orange slices. Served hot or cold.

items.name: Stuffed Salmon w/ Crab Meat & Spinach
items.description: Baked, lemon & white wine broth. Served in foil pan to reheat.

items.name: Baked Salmon Oreganata
items.description: Baked with white wine, lemon juice, butter, olive oil with a bread crumb topping. Served in foil pan to reheat. Includes lemon slices & parsley.

extraction_notes: Parsed from the source PDF with LlamaParse tier 'agentic_plus' (the highest tier), job pjb-3nn7lwrl72nzzaqx5yz8kbr24dhc.

WINE MENU: every varietal in the source lists the same three wines (Joel Gott $12.99 / Four Graces $22.99 / Cherry Pie $18.99, plus Elouan $19.99 under Pinot Noir and Chardonnay). This repetition is present in the PDF itself and looks like unfinished placeholder content - it is not a parsing artifact.
DESSERTS: cakes, mini cakes, cookies, pastries, cheesecakes, tarts and pies carry no printed prices in the source. They are included with prices: [] and price_status 'unpriced'.
MEAT ENTREES: 'Roasted Prime Rib' and 'Roasted Filet Mignon' appear as headings but their prices live in the page artwork, not the text layer. Marked 'unpriced'.

COLD CUT PLATTERS: the $12.99 row is labelled 'COLD CUT PLATTER ONLY' in the source, duplicating the $8.99 row's name. Renamed to 'Cold Cut Platter Deluxe' for clarity; original wording noted on the item.

The Table of Contents lists a 'Salads' section on page 11, but no salad items appear on that page in the source PDF - only Rollups and Pinwheels. Nothing was dropped in parsing; the section appears to be absent from the menu.
MINI PASTRY PLATTERS are priced per pastry ($1.99); 'computed_total' is derived from the printed piece count and is not printed on the menu.
